title: Fastpack
description: FastPack is a modpack designed to optimize Minecraft, providing a smoother gaming experience and practical features. Discover a more performant and enjoyable game with mods selected to enhance your Minecraft advent.
body:
# FastPack
Welcome to **FastPack**, a modpack specially designed to **optimize** **Minecraft**! This pack brings together mods that enhance game performance while adding practical features and visual improvements. Perfect for players seeking a smoother gaming experience without sacrificing quality.

With mods like **Sodium** to boost performance, **WorldEdit** to **simplify building**, and **Xaero's Minimap** to ease navigation, FastPack aims to make your Minecraft experience more **enjoyable** and **efficient**. Each mod has been carefully selected to contribute to game optimization while adding useful and interesting features.

---
